title: Rift Valley Geothermal: Brine Reinjection Loops
strategies: constrained next-fit baseline: keep filling the current loop until a well fails on flow OR temperature band, then open a fresh loop and never look back (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)
first-fit-decreasing on flow with band checks: seat the largest-flow wells first into the first compatible open loop, reusing gaps that next-fit wastes but ignoring temperature structure
temperature-aware best-fit-decreasing: cluster wells by temperature band, then best-fit the flows within each compatible cluster so band-forbidden pairs never block a loop
seeded multi-restart + relocation local search: run best-fit under many deterministic well orderings and repeatedly disband the smallest loop by relocating its wells, keeping the fewest-loop layout
